title: populus deltoides var. monilifera
intro: Populus deltoides var. monilifera, also known as the cottonwood, is a variety of the black cottonwood tree native to North America. This deciduous tree is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The bark and leaves of Populus deltoides var. monilifera are used to treat various health issues, including fever, diarrhea, and respiratory problems, offering benefits such as reduced inflammation, improved digestion, and boosted immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used internally or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
